feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: configuration document & SAP notes
entry.content:
Need guidance on std configuration documents for particular topics and relevant guidance on SAP Note.

i have s-user id plz give me guidance

entry.title: Originals can not be selected in tco. CV03n
entry.content:
Hello

After the conversion to S/4HANA we are facing an issue in tco. CV03n, when working on a small screen or in a small window. Due to the fact that the subcreens for Document Data und Superior Document are nor resizable, it happens that the Originals are no longer displayed. Even the scrollbar for the Originals section is hidden. Please see the attached print screen.

Is there a chance to fix that so the users can find and display all relevant documents?

Regards, Markus

entry.title: Why are standard CDS Views not showing in Custom CDS View app to use as a reference?
entry.content:
I am attempting to follow the guide: Setup Guide
General Ledger Master Record Creation Process using SAP Workflow Management or SAP Build Process Automation.

The Guide has these instructions for creating the necessary Custom CDS Views:

Steps for Creating Custom CDS:
1. Click on Custom CDS app in Fiori Launchpad.
2. Select standard CDS view name like -ICompanycode and click on Create button
3. Enter the custom CDS view name like -ZZ1_COMPANYCODE and Select the specific fields
from standard CDS view and click on Save
4. After SAVE click on publish button to create API-ZZ1_COMPANYCODE_CDS which is used
to register OData service.
5. Repeat same steps for other CDS views.

 

However, the new Custom CDS View app does not bring in the standard CDS Views to select in step 2. I have seen other Community Q&A indicating that the new Custom CDS View App does not show the Standard CDS Views like the deprecated version had done.   How do I create the Custom CDS Views with reference to standard?

entry.title: generate XSD-File (XML Schema) for ODATA-Service
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I added a SAP Standard API/Service API_CUSTOMER_RETURN_SRV (Transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE) in our SAP on-prem S/4 System. Now I need to create a XSD-File for this service but I couldn't find an answer how to do this.

does anyone know, how I can create a XSD-File in S/4?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Recording negative score (-ve) against a question in Audit Management
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I have a business requirement where a negative score procedure is followed in Audit management. 

Is it possible to record a negative score (3-) while evaluating a question in an Audit? 

If yes, please let me know the procedure for it. 

 

Thanks 
Jay

entry.title: EWM Posting as Own stock for consignment articles, but correctly in ERP
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am facing an issue while posting the STO returned to DC in EWM.
Scenario:
We are processing a return delivery STO from Store to EWM managed DC.
Whereas for the consignment articles the returns are posting as own stock in EWM, but the ERP postings are correctly posted as 161k and 671k movement.

Note: Using Retail consignment process

Something strange I could not figure it out, how come system is posting as OWN in EWM and passing the GR confirmation to ERP with K indicator.

The material master setup correctly as per Retail consignment Logic https://help.sap.com/erp2005_ehp_07/helpdata/en/aa/e2c353b677b44ce10000000a174cb4/content.htm?loaded_from_frameset=true 
Anything I am missing in EWM, also I noticed the stock usage C is not picking for this Return STO's consignment articles, though warehouse attributes are mapped with consignment indicator.

Any quick suggestion will be helpful, as this is creating dual ownership for same article.

entry.title: Creating multiple PM Malfunction Reports at once
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a question regarding create PM Malfunction Report:

Is it possible to create multiple PM Malfunction Reports at the same time with the same data, but with different equipment? And, how would that work?

Thanks a lot for your help!

Nicole

entry.title: Authorization as validation on VF04
entry.content:
Dear Guru,

Can we add validation from VF04?

Sample:
User have a object roles Sales Org "ABC" and Shipping Point "1234" and Delivery Order Doc have a LIKP - VKORG = ABC and LIKP - VSTEL = 1234

Scenario:
User want to create Billing in VF04 with a Individual Billing Document or Collective Billing Document or Collective Billing Doc./Online,

My Plan is Program logic read Object Roles first then Read the Delivery Order Doc. If the information from both matches, generate Billing Document when user klik Individual Billing Document or Collective Billing Document or Collective Billing Doc./Online

but if the information from both doesn't match, Billing not generated and error messages appears "No Authorization for this Sales Org and Shipping Point"


Please for the advice

Regards,

entry.title: Extract Header/Item Texts of Billing Documents
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Is it possible to take an extract of the Header/Item Texts entered in 'Manage Billing Documents' Launchpad app?

entry.title: Error message F5A 192 when post document for TH
entry.content:
Dear Community,

This is for TH Billing when trying to post a billing document, getting error: Enter a Business Location. I have referred to Note 376018. The code corrections exists. However, this check is causing the error.

ACCIT_FI-BUPLA - Initial(Blank) as TH does not use Business Places in this case.

Could you please suggest?

Thanks!

entry.title: S/4Hana Fiori - gCTS - Repository could not be created
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are SAP S/4Hana 2022 FPS01, facing some issues while adding the GitHub url to gCTS. we have already completed required configuration and health checks also looks ok. but still it's not allowing us to add the repository. 

CX_CTS_ABAP_VC_EXCEPTION is bothering us.

Find the attached error.

Regards

Naveen Jain

entry.title: OS/DB Migration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

Since ECC will be out of support by 2027, so will it be a wise decision to upskill yourself in OS/DB migration? Shouldn't S/4HANA conversion be in more demand rather than OS/DB migration?

 

Looking for expert advice.

entry.title: F4 help with multiple tabs(tab-strip) and multiple selection
entry.content:
Hi
I have a requirement of displaying master tables under their module names inside an f4. So all the Material Master tables would be displayed under Material Master Tab and Vendor Master tables under Vendor Master tab. I also want that the table names that I will display should come with a checkbox for multiple selection.

Please suggest me some ways of doing so.

Regards,

Farhan

entry.title: Working with Preliminary Billing Documents in SAP GUI
entry.content:
Dears,  
Is it possible to create and process a Preliminary Billing document using standard SAP GUI (not the Create Preliminary Billing Documents app in Fiori)? I know that it's possible to modify (VFP2) or display (VFP3) that document in SAP GUI but I cannot find transaction for creation, VFP1 has a completely different purpose that confuses.

Considering the user uses SAP GUI in daily work and uses preliminary documents rarely, he has to create a preliminary document in Fioi (e.g. in reference to Sales order created in GUI), then he can modify this document in GUI via VFP2 transaction, but then 'Finalize' the preliminary document in Fiori and create the actual billing in Fiori. After that he can back to GUI and continue working as of VF02 transaction to release to accounting etc.   

Am I missing something or such switching between GUI and Fiori is the only way to work with preliminary documents using as much SAP GUI as possible? 

Regards
Krzysztof

entry.title: What types of documents does the material document cover?
entry.content: What types of documents does the material document cover?

entry.title: Negative & Positive Entries Stuck in TR-Zone (922) in LS24 And Can be Confirmed via LT06
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the process of moving some units of a defective material from a WM to IM sloc via MIGO_TR, we now have a situation where in LS24, we have positive & negative entries of the material stuck in TR_Zone (LT22) and the system won't let us do the confirmation via LT06. We're struggling to understanding why the negative and positive entries are not cancelling out and leaving just the difference. We have checked and there are no existing PCNs. I can see that there are other stock of the same item in LS24 but with different storage types (just additional information in case it matters). 

Can someone please provide some guidance on how to resolve this issue so we can perform the confirmation, get rid of the separate negative and positive entries, so that the transaction can be completed?

Thanks in advance.

Bunie

entry.title: MII - ERP IDOC: user type Communication Data
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

We have the application resource XMIIIDOC01 setting with username ME_USER and password on the MII application server.

ME_USER is an ERP user of type "Comunication Data"

Because communication data user type is affected by the password expiretime, it could be a problem.

Which is the best practice to workaround this problem?

Thanks a lot
Mario

entry.title: Depreciation Beyond Useful Life of an Asset
entry.content:
Issue: Depreciation  calculation beyond 8 years (96 month or 192 half month period) which suppose to end 31st Aug 2029 but system is planning till 30 June 2030.

Asset Initial Acquisition is on 12/31/2021 for 186,033.50 and Asset value date 12/31/2021

Useful life 8 years

Original Depreciation start date 09/01/2021

Addition during the year 2024

Asset Addition on 02/29/2024 amounting $111,002.00 and relevant Asset Value date 02/29/2024

Dep Key : LINA    

Base Method : 007     percentage from Life

Depreciation posted in Feb 2024  is amounting $ 4250.39    instead of 33,531.85

Excess planned depreciation $33,531.85 posted between 09/01/2029 to 07/31/2030

 Question : How to Depreciate entire Asset value of assets including additions in subsequent years within 8 years of useful life. 

I tried to Change base method from Yes to No  as below 

Depreciation After End of Planned Life

Set this indicator, if you want the system to continue depreciation after the end of the planned useful life.

 still system is not zero-out entire NBV after end of useful life 8 years which leaves $13,248.50 balance in NBV.

Please advice.

entry.title: Manage FMEAs (F4340) is missing the "Analysis" Tab
entry.content:
Hi all,

Being on S/4 2023 initial shipment stack and I've activated the Odata and sicf services of  Manage FMEAs (F4340). ( https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4340')/S28OP )

and the app opens alright.. but I'm missing the "Analysis" tab and all the functionality if gives like the graphical view. Does it require any special roles or other services? Can't see any messages in browser Dev Tools that stick out nor in the Appslibrary. What am I missing?

I've attached 2 pics "apps_lib.jpg" displaying the missing analysis tab and "current".jpg" how it looks currently (no analysis tab)

regards

Christian

entry.title: Reservations and MRP planning
entry.content: Trying to wrap my head around reservations within MRP planning.
